summary: fab init Shadow Mirroring refactor — 10 tasks across 3 layers: (1) data contract: ForensicReport schema ForensicAssertion[] + candidate_files[] + sampling_budget; (2) SKILL behavior: Check-not-Ask single-round Architecture Review (Phase 0 active recon / Phase 1 batch Check / Phase 2 auto-construct to .fabric/agents/ only); (3) Shadow Mirroring physical topology: .fabric/agents/ 1:1 source mirror + _cross/ subtree for cross-cutting; ZERO rule files in business directories; 6 bootstrap templates upgrade hard rules from 'Before editing' to 'Before any code reading/architecture planning/logic modification'; root AGENTS.md simplified to Bootstrap Protocol; agents-meta schema extends topology_type=mirror|cross-cutting + layer; sync-meta scans only .fabric/agents/**/*.md. Two optional items: fab_plan_context batch MCP tool + compliance telemetry.
approach: Data-contract-first ordering: TASK-001 (ForensicReport schema + forensic.ts) is foundational — all SKILL and test tasks depend on ForensicAssertion[] being defined. TASK-002 (SKILL rewrite) and TASK-003 (agents-meta + sync-meta refactor) and TASK-004 (init-context schema) can run in parallel after TASK-001 since they are independent modules. TASK-005 (bootstrap upgrade) and TASK-006 (werewolf fixture + root AGENTS.md simplification) form a sequential pair. TASK-007 (e2e tests) gates on TASK-001 + TASK-003 + TASK-006. TASK-008 (docs) gates on TASK-005 but can start early for structural sections. Optional TASK-009 and TASK-010 are independent and can be deferred entirely.
estimated_time: 6.5 hours (core 8 tasks: ~5 hours; optional TASK-009/010: ~1.5 hours additional)

design_decisions.decision: topology_type enum = mirror|cross-cutting (not colocated|rules-frontmatter from Round 2)
design_decisions.rationale: Round 3 user decision reversed Round 2 hybrid topology; pure Shadow Mirroring has no colocated variant
design_decisions.tradeoff: Round 2 analysis artifacts reference colocated topology — must not be used as source for schema values

design_decisions.decision: ForensicAssertion[] replaces recommendations_for_skill: string[] with one-version deprecation window
design_decisions.rationale: SKILL cannot make implicit-accept decisions without structured confidence tiers + evidence anchors
design_decisions.tradeoff: Temporary dual-field emission adds minor complexity to forensic.ts during migration

design_decisions.decision: SKILL Phase 2 writes ONLY to .fabric/agents/; zero colocated AGENTS.md; zero .claude/rules/; zero @import
design_decisions.rationale: R3-CQ2/CQ4: Pure Zero-Pollution; no bridge artifacts; perception-phase vacuum addressed by bootstrap protocol not ambient files
design_decisions.tradeoff: Full SKILL.md rewrite required; cannot incrementally patch on top of R2 design

design_decisions.decision: Bootstrap hard rule scope upgraded to 'Before ANY code reading, architecture planning, or logic modification'
design_decisions.rationale: R3-CQ1: Closes perception-phase vacuum where AI reasons about code without calling fab_get_rules
design_decisions.tradeoff: Stronger requirement may cause more frequent MCP calls; justified by Shadow Mirroring architecture requirement

design_decisions.decision: TASK-009 (fab_plan_context) and TASK-010 (compliance telemetry) marked optional
design_decisions.rationale: Independent of core refactor; user may ship 8 core tasks first; optional items provide value but not required for Shadow Mirroring to function
design_decisions.tradeoff: Users without TASK-009 must make sequential fab_get_rules calls at planning phase; no compliance audit until TASK-010

data_flow.diagram: fab init → forensic.ts → ForensicAssertion[] + CandidateFileEntry[] → agents-md-init SKILL → Phase 0 recon (15×100 budget) → Phase 1 batch Check (implicit HIGH / explicit MEDIUM-LOW) → Phase 2 auto-construct → .fabric/agents/ mirror tree + init-context.json + agents.meta.json
dependencies: packages/server/src/tools/get-rules.ts (fab_get_rules — reads from .fabric/agents/ via agents.meta.json scope_glob)

quality_check.notes: Plan generated from structured handoff spec with 3-round analysis context. All 10 tasks have 2+ implementation steps, quantified convergence criteria, valid dependency chain. TASK-009/010 marked optional with explicit metadata. No circular dependencies. topology_type values verified as mirror|cross-cutting per R3 (not R2 colocated|rules-frontmatter). SKILL.md write-target constraint (zero colocated AGENTS.md) verified across TASK-002 and TASK-006.
